tender.description: Renewal work by SDBC/BC on the following motor roads under Chakrata Constituency of Dehradun District under Annual maintenance year2026-27. (i) Chakrata-Lakhamandal-Barnigad (SH-18) Km 1 to 10. (ii) Gauraghati to Manthat via Village Lavadi Km 1 to 4
